# discord_invite (Resource)

Creates an invite to a Discord channel. Invites are immutable: any change forces a new invite to be created.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_invite" "welcome" {
  channel_id = "456789012345678901"
  max_age    = 86400 # 1 day, 0 = never expires
  max_uses   = 25    # 0 = unlimited
  temporary  = false
  unique     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel the invite points to.

### Optional

- `max_age` (Number) Duration of the invite in seconds before expiry (0 never expires).
- `max_uses` (Number) Maximum number of uses (0 is unlimited).
- `temporary` (Boolean) Whether the invite grants temporary membership.
- `unique` (Boolean) Whether to always create a new unique invite rather than reusing a similar one.

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) The invite code.
- `url` (String) The full invite URL.
